examples: Though seldom encountered, the bushmaster is potentially lethal.
A bite from a bushmaster has an 80 % fatality rate, even with anti - venom.
The Bushmaster M4 Types Carbine, a semiautomatic rifle, uses a 20 or 30-round magazine.
Three guns were recovered near the gunman's body: a Glock, a Sig Sauer and a .223 Bushmaster rifle.
The rifle is a Bushmaster version of a widely made AR-15, the civilian version of the M-16 rifle used by the U.S. military.
